reviews.review_description:
The game looks impressive, and the open-world design feels expansive and well put together. It creates a strong first impression and shows a lot of potential.

One area that could be developed further is player engagement. For example, certain actions could include more immersive/interactive experiences.

Overall, it’s a great experience with a solid foundation.

reviews.review_title: Great Game with Lots of Potential!
reviews.review_description: Many things to do in Arctic Expedition, bungee jumping, flying on a plane, multiple islands, and more! Looking forward to new updates :)
Wonderful app for Arctic experience on VR. Must try!

developer_response.body: Thanks we are working on adding more world experience.
